name: SafeWeave
description: MCP server with 8 parallel security scanners — SAST, secrets, dependencies, IaC, container, DAST, license, and posture. Integrates into Cursor, Claude Code, VS Code in seconds.

skills.name: SAST Scan
skills.description: Run static analysis security testing on source code and surface vulnerabilities by severity level

skills.name: Secrets Detection
skills.description: Detect leaked API keys, tokens, and credentials committed to code using pattern-based scanning

skills.name: Dependency Audit
skills.description: Audit package dependencies for known CVEs and license compliance issues across major ecosystems

skills.name: IaC Security Scan
skills.description: Scan Terraform, CloudFormation, and Kubernetes configs for misconfigurations and security gaps
